mapper.select:
SELECT n.* FROM note_note n
n.user_id = #{userId} AND n.is_deleted = 1 0
AND n.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%')
AND n.is_favorite = 1
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM note_category_rel WHERE note_id = n.id AND category_id = #{query.categoryId})
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tag_rel WHERE entity_id = n.id AND entity_type = 'note' AND tag_id = #{query.tagId})
ORDER BY n.updated_at DESC

SELECT n.* FROM note_note n
n.user_id = #{userId} AND n.is_deleted = 1
AND n.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY n.deleted_at DESC
SELECT c.id, c.name FROM category c INNER JOIN note_category_rel r ON c.id = r.category_id WHERE r.note_id = #{noteId} AND c.type = 'note'
